title: Multimodal real evaluation and quality loop

providers.rerank_boundary: GLM-Rerank configured boundary unchanged; Phase 48 evaluators used retrieval/tool paths that do not persist reranker raw responses.

top_failure_modes: Natural-language queries still confuse same-page or same-topic competing figures.
Table/chart-like images often have generic visual descriptions and weak caption discrimination.
Some extracted figures have repeated or sparse captions, lowering caption/path hit rates.

quality_repairs: Table backfill now writes Chunk rows directly and uses max(chunk_index)+1 to avoid non-contiguous index collisions.
Table chunk content is capped for embedding-safety before GLM-Embedding-3 indexing.
Figure retrieval suppresses text-only visual-negative queries before vector search.
User-image domain gating rejects clear non-engineering images even when the user question contains concrete terms.
Table retrieval now combines GLM vector candidates with keyword table candidates.
